que: What is the primary purpose of the Tooltip widget in Flutter?
options: To display a message when the user long-presses or hovers over a widget

que: Which parameter of Tooltip is required and holds the text to display?
Which parameter of Tooltip specifies the widget to which the tooltip applies?
Which parameter of Tooltip controls the decoration (background, border, etc.) of the tooltip?
Which parameter of Tooltip controls the style of the tooltip text?
Which parameter determines whether the tooltip is displayed below the widget by default?
Where is it especially useful to add tooltips?
options: Icons and buttons to provide extra info

que: how should tooltip messages be written?
Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with Tooltip?
Why should you avoid using tooltips for essential information?
options: Because users might miss them or not trigger them

que: What is the default value of verticalOffset in Tooltip?
What is the default value of preferBelow in Tooltip?
What is the default value of excludeFromSemantics in Tooltip?
Which parameter controls whether haptic/auditory feedback is produced when the tooltip is shown?
Which parameters control how long to wait before showing the tooltip and how long to show it?
Which parameter controls how the tooltip is triggered (tap, long press, etc.)?
Which of these is a good example use case for Tooltip?
options: Showing an explanation when the user hovers over an info icon
